document.source_title: Why MS Dhoni’s long-awaited Chepauk return did not lead to IPL 2026 comeback for CSK in SRH game

claims.claim_text: MS Dhoni did not play in the match against Sunrisers Hyderabad due to injury.
claims.evidence_text: Gaikwad silenced the home crowd after Ravi Shastri was compelled to ask the burning question. 'He's still here, but he's not fit enough to play this game.'

entities.name: MS Dhoni
entities.evidence_text: For the first time in this IPL season, MS Dhoni turned up at a venue on Chennai Super Kings' matchday.

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: IPL team that MS Dhoni plays for.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings' MS Dhoni during a practice session ahead of an IPL 2026 match against Sunrisers Hyderabad.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.evidence_text: CSK's final home game this season against Sunrisers Hyderabad.

entities.name: Ruturaj Gaikwad
entities.evidence_text: But captain Ruturaj Gaikwad killed the buzz straightaway at the toss.

events.evidence_text: Dhoni did not show any signs of visible discomfort when batting in the nets on Sunday, it was after the session that he decided not to feature in the game against the Sunrisers.

citations.title: Why MS Dhoni’s long-awaited Chepauk return did not lead to IPL 2026 comeback for CSK in SRH game

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet covering sports.

geolocation.name: MA Chidambaram Stadium
geolocation.evidence_text: Dhoni turned up at a venue on Chennai Super Kings' matchday at the MA Chidambaram Stadium.
